description.description: https://gitlab.com/eyeo/adblockplus/webstores/blob/d7acfa77af92c53bce1aa5e243bd81768e004e01/spec/chrome-web-store/listing-en_US.md#summary, Note: this cannot be longer than 132 characters
description.message: Remove ads on YouTube and everywhere else you browse.

name_releasebuild.description: Extension name to be shown for release builds. Note: this cannot be longer than 45 characters.

reverse_trial_ended_body.description: Body text for the reverse trial ended dialog
reverse_trial_ended_body.message: Abonner på AdBlock Premium for å fortsette å blokkere videoannonser og nyte alle premiumfunksjoner.

reverse_trial_ended_title.description: Title for the reverse trial ended dialog

reverse_trial_learn_more.description: Text for the 'learn more' link that appear under the CTA button

reverse_trial_midpoint_body.description: Body text for the reverse trial midpoint dialog
reverse_trial_midpoint_body.message: Abonner nå for å fortsette å blokkere videoannonser og nyte alle premiumfunksjoner uten avbrudd.

reverse_trial_midpoint_title.description: Title for the reverse trial midpoint dialog

reverse_trial_premium_button.description: CTA button text for the midpoint and ended dialogs

reverse_trial_start_body_1.description: First paragraph of the start dialog body
reverse_trial_start_body_1.message: Vi har nettopp aktivert 14 dager med gratis AdBlock Premium for deg.

reverse_trial_start_body_2.description: Second paragraph of the start dialog body
reverse_trial_start_body_2.message: Kjenn forskjellen – videoer har nå færre annonser og forsinkelser takket være Premium-filtrene våre!

reverse_trial_start_button.description: CTA button text for the start dialog

reverse_trial_start_title.description: Title for the reverse trial start dialog
